## Security and compatibility

- [ ] REST and MCP behavior remain aligned where applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, private hostnames, personal paths, logs or runtime state are included.
- [ ] The change does not describe `SAFE_MODE` as a sandbox.
- [ ] User-facing behavior and migration impact are documented.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`

- [ ] MCP/OAuth smoke test when relevant
- [ ] OpenAPI checked when schemas or routes changed
